title: UmbracoStorageProvidersAzureBlobSchema
description: Defines the appsettings JSON schema for Umbraco Storage Providers - Azure Blob Storage configuration.

Umbraco.description: Configuration container for all Umbraco products.

UmbracoDefinition.description: Represents the configuration container for all Umbraco products.

StorageDefinition.description: Represents the configuration of Umbraco Storage Providers.

AzureBlob.description: Configuration of Umbraco Storage Providers - Azure Blob Storage, keyed by file system name (e.g. "Media").

AzureBlobFileSystemOptions.description: The Azure Blob File System options.

ConnectionString.description: Gets or sets the storage account connection string.

ContainerName.description: Gets or sets the container name.

ContainerRootPath.description: Gets or sets the root path of the container.

VirtualPath.description: Gets or sets the virtual path.

Cache.description: Gets or sets the in-memory cache settings applied to blob metadata lookups by the read-only file provider.

Retry.description: Gets or sets the retry and timeout settings applied to the default Blob client.

AzureBlobFileSystemCacheOptions.description: Cache settings applied to blob metadata lookups performed by the read-only file provider.

Enabled.description: Gets or sets a value indicating whether blob metadata caching is enabled.

HitDuration.description: Gets or sets how long a successful metadata lookup is cached.

MissDuration.description: Gets or sets how long a not-found metadata result is cached.

AzureBlobFileSystemRetryOptions.description: Retry and timeout settings applied to the default BlobContainerClient created from AzureBlobFileSystemOptions.

MaxRetries.description: Gets or sets the maximum number of retry attempts before giving up.

NetworkTimeout.description: Gets or sets the timeout applied to an individual network operation.

Mode.description: Gets or sets the approach to use for calculating retry delays.

Delay.description:
Gets or sets the delay between retry attempts for a fixed approach or the delay on which to base
calculations for a backoff-based approach.

MaxDelay.description: Gets or sets the maximum permissible delay between retry attempts when using a backoff approach.
